raw.cumulativeActivity: Sum of occupied clade-ticks from simulation tick 1 through the end of each window.
raw.normalizedCumulativeActivity: Cumulative activity divided by elapsed simulation ticks at the end of each window.
raw.newActivity: Occupied clade-ticks within a window contributed by clades whose firstSeenTick falls inside that same window.

actual.observedLifetime: Observed lifetime is extinctTick - firstSeenTick for extinct clades and maxTick - firstSeenTick for extant clades.
actual.persistentNewActivity: Occupied clade-ticks within an origin window contributed by clades whose observed lifetime reaches the survival threshold.
actual.censoredWindow: A window is censored when its end tick plus the survival threshold exceeds the simulation horizon, so late-origin clades in that window cannot yet be fully evaluated.
actual.persistentWindowFraction: For one seed and threshold, the fraction of evaluable post-burn-in windows whose persistentNewActivity is greater than zero.
actual.allEvaluableWindowsPositive: For one seed and threshold, true when every evaluable post-burn-in window has persistentNewActivity greater than zero.

raw.cumulativeActivity: Sum of occupied clade-ticks from simulation tick 1 through the end of each window.
raw.normalizedCumulativeActivity: Cumulative activity divided by elapsed simulation ticks at the end of each window.
raw.newActivity: Occupied clade-ticks within a window contributed by clades whose firstSeenTick falls inside that same window.

matchedNull.observedLifetime: Observed lifetime is extinctTick - firstSeenTick for extinct clades and maxTick - firstSeenTick for extant clades.
matchedNull.persistentNewActivity: Occupied clade-ticks within an origin window contributed by clades whose observed lifetime reaches the survival threshold.
matchedNull.censoredWindow: A window is censored when its end tick plus the survival threshold exceeds the simulation horizon, so late-origin clades in that window cannot yet be fully evaluated.
matchedNull.persistentWindowFraction: For one seed and threshold, the fraction of evaluable post-burn-in windows whose persistentNewActivity is greater than zero.
matchedNull.allEvaluableWindowsPositive: For one seed and threshold, true when every evaluable post-burn-in window has persistentNewActivity greater than zero.

study.matchedSchedule: For each seed and cladogenesis threshold, the pseudo-clade null preserves the observed clade birth count at every firstSeenTick.
study.relabeling: Pseudo-clade founders are randomly selected from species born at each matched birth tick, and remaining species are randomly reassigned to pseudo-clades that were already active at the prior tick.
study.actualToNullPersistentWindowFractionRati: For one seed and survival threshold, actual clade persistentWindowFraction divided by matched-null persistentWindowFraction. Null when the matched-null fraction is zero.
study.persistentWindowFractionDeltaVsNull: For one seed and survival threshold, actual clade persistentWindowFraction minus matched-null persistentWindowFraction.
study.actualToNullPersistentActivityMeanRatio: For one seed and survival threshold, actual clade postBurnInPersistentNewActivityMean divided by matched-null postBurnInPersistentNewActivityMean. Null when the matched-null mean is zero.
study.persistentActivityMeanDeltaVsNull: For one seed and survival threshold, actual clade postBurnInPersistentNewActivityMean minus matched-null postBurnInPersistentNewActivityMean.

definition.cladeHabitatCoupling: Blend weight applied to clade-level habitat preference during movement and harvest. Zero uses only species habitat preference; one applies the full configured clade coupling.
definition.birthScheduleMatchedAllSeeds: True when every seed in the coupling row preserved the actual clade birth schedule in the matched pseudo-clade null.
definition.actualToNullPersistentWindowFractionRati: Mean across seeds of actualToNullPersistentWindowFractionRatio for the selected survival threshold.
definition.persistentWindowFractionDeltaVsNullMean: Mean across seeds of actual persistentWindowFraction minus matched-null persistentWindowFraction for the selected survival threshold.
definition.actualToNullPersistentActivityMeanRatioM: Mean across seeds of actualToNullPersistentActivityMeanRatio for the selected survival threshold.
definition.persistentActivityMeanDeltaVsNullMean: Mean across seeds of actual persistent activity mean minus matched-null persistent activity mean for the selected survival threshold.
